documentation.description: This package provides simple locking primitives on top of GNAT.Semaphores.

simple_types.name: Scoped_Lock
simple_types.code:
type Scoped_Lock (Lock : access Mutual_Exclusion)
is limited private;

subtypes.name: Mutual_Exclusion

documentation.description:
This subtype represents a Mutual exclusion primitive, which is a common
use case for Semaphores.
